budget.policy: Use this packet first. Expand only listed specs/code/evidence when phase or stale revision requires exact source.

task.title: Render architecture graph in status panel
task.summary: Update the CodeWiki status panel to render the generated architecture view and show component or flow details when selected.

goal.outcome: Humans and agents can inspect system architecture visually through the status panel and zoom into component or flow detail cards.
acceptance: Status panel renders the generated architecture graph or a fallback graph view.
Selecting a component opens linked component markdown/details.
Selecting a flow opens linked flow markdown/details.
Health colors use strict legend semantics from roadmap/drift/view state.
Panel degrades gracefully when architecture views are stale or absent.
non_goals: Make the panel a full diagram editor.

delta.desired: Architecture graph becomes an interactive navigation surface.
delta.current: Status panel focuses on status and roadmap, not architecture graph navigation.
delta.closure: Panel can render graph and detail cards from generated views.

specs.title: Product Surfaces
specs.summary: Human and AI interaction surfaces for CodeWiki.

specs.title: CodeWiki v2 Operating Model
specs.summary: Agreed v2 model for canonical truth, views, memory use, subagents, heartbeat, optional runtime tools, and sanitation.

evidence.summary: Implemented architecture fallback display and richer wiki detail cards; ready for verification.
issues: Generated architecture JSON/Mermaid remains TASK-020; panel degrades to system-doc fallback until that view exists.
